tool_purpose: Speech-to-speech translation model from fairseq S2UT (paper/code) for Spanish-English. Trained on mTEDx, CoVoST 2, Europarl-ST, and VoxPopuli. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/unit_hifigan_mhubert_vp_en_es_fr_it3_400k_layer11_km1000_lj_dur').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
